hooks.command: file_path=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$file_path" ] && echo "$file_path" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then cd /home/thomasjiralerspong/make-evil-dumb && uv run ruff check --fix --quiet "$file_path" 2>/dev/null; uv run ruff format --quiet "$file_path" 2>/dev/null; fi
